name: dev-pomogator
description: Team coding standards and workflows for Claude Code: skills (create-spec, run-tests, plan-pomogator, etc.), rules, hooks, and MCP servers — distributed via canonical Anthropic marketplace.

spec_access_enforce.title: Enforce MCP-only access to specs
spec_access_enforce.description: When ON, the agent's raw Read/Grep/Edit/Write/Bash over .specs/** is DENIED and routed through the dev-pomogator-specs MCP door (read_spec_doc / apply_spec_change / etc.); deliberate bypass via SPEC_ACCESS_SKIP=1. When OFF, the spec-access-guard only LOGS violations (shadow mode). Lets you get enforcement without hand-editing settings.json.
